title: Monster Energy
description: This mod adds 3 flavors of the beloved Monster Energy to Minecraft!
body:
#  THE MONSTER ENERGY MINECRAFT MOD!
Hey you, yes you! Have you ever wanted to get a taste of that sweet, sweet heart failure even in game? Well look no further than this mod!
## What's included?
Three consumable Monster drink flavors, each one with a special effect.
- Classic Monster![pixel texture of the classic monster energy flavor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b72ea8c1c6fbf047f8a7685cb20c3d3dcead9ab.png)
- Ultra White Monster![pixel texture of the ultra white monster flavor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6531ab66752945ffd31e3124f4acadd5c0300d74.png)
- Pipeline Punch Monster![pixel texture of the pipeline punch monster energy flavor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c24bb0b98e9135d4f47d4b85d33d1eeb18dde910.png)
## How it works
Each Monster flavor is crafted by using an **empty can**, a color of dye, a food item and sugar. (Check the gallery page for each recipe or install the Roughly Enough Items mod)

Each Drink has a different effect. Making them great early game potions!
## Small Notice
This is my first mod and was made using MCreator (sad trombone sound) so it may have some bugs and overall not be the best, I made it just for fun :P

**Either way I hope you enjoy!**
